settings.heading: Questions, answered
settings.text: Sizing, shipping, returns, care, orders, and everyday wardrobe questions.

settings.question: How do I choose the right size?
settings.answer: Check the size guide on each product page and compare the measurements with a garment you already love. For a relaxed fit, choose the larger size when you are between sizes.

settings.question: What fabrics does MUSTARD use?
settings.answer: Our collections use breathable cottons, soft viscose blends, linen blends, crepe, and seasonally selected knits. Fabric details are listed on every product page.

settings.question: Will sold-out styles come back?
settings.answer: Core pieces are restocked regularly. Limited seasonal drops may not return, so save your size or join the waitlist when it appears.

settings.question: How should I care for my clothes?
settings.answer: Follow the care label inside each garment. As a general rule, wash inside out on a gentle cycle, avoid harsh bleach, and dry in shade to preserve colour and fabric feel.

settings.question: Do colours look the same in person?
settings.answer: We photograph colours as accurately as possible, but tones can vary slightly by screen. Product descriptions call out undertones and fabric finish where it helps.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard shipping: 3–5 business days. Express: 1–2 business days. International orders: 7–14 business days depending on destination. All orders are dispatched from our Sydney warehouse within 1 business day of being placed.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes — free standard shipping on all Australian orders over $50. International free shipping thresholds vary by region and are shown at checkout.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Absolutely. You will receive a shipping confirmation email with a tracking link as soon as your order leaves our warehouse. You can also view order status any time in My Account.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: We ship to 40+ countries. Shipping costs and estimated delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your location. Please note customs duties and import taxes are the customer responsibility.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: You can request an exchange or return within 7 days of delivery as long as the item is unused, unwashed, and has its original tags attached.

settings.question: How do I start a return?
settings.answer: Email hello@mustardfashion.com with your order number and reason for return. Our team will respond within 24 hours with the next steps.

settings.question: When will I receive my refund?
settings.answer: Refunds are processed within 2 business days of receiving the returned item. Funds typically appear in your account within 5–7 business days depending on your bank.

settings.question: How do I create an account?
settings.answer: Visit the My Account page and click “Create Account”. You will need your email address and a password. You can also create an account during checkout.

settings.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
settings.answer: On the login page, click “Forgot password?” and enter your email address. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if it does not appear.

settings.question: Can I modify or cancel my order?
settings.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 1 hour of placement. After that, our warehouse begins picking and packing and changes can no longer be made. Contact us immediately at hello@mustardfashion.com if you need to make a change.

settings.title: Frequently asked questions
settings.cta_text: Our customer care team replies within one business day.
